docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,131.57 AS TO DEFENDANT SATCHWELL, AARON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,780.00 FILED BY LIENEMANN, ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT SATCHWELL, AARON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SATCHWELL, AARON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIENEMANN, ANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SATCHWELL, AARON $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,052.00, PLAINTIFF WAS ON THE LEASE UNTIL 3/31/05. PLAINTIF IS NOT ON THE NEW LEASE AND IS THEREFORE ENTIILED TO HER PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. MINUS ANY DEDUCTION BY THE LANDLORD, THE PRESIDIO TRUST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SATCHWELL, AARON
